title: Tags
description: Tags freely label drives and charging sessions — e.g. for customers, projects, or trips.

row.usage: {driveCount, plural, one {# drive} other {# drives}} · {chargeCount, plural, one {# charging session} other {# charging sessions}}

deleteConfirm.withUsage: Really delete tag "{name}"? It is assigned {count} times — the assignments will also be removed.

errors.nameTaken: A tag with this name already exists.
